I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

input.initialPrompt: I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

data.reasoningText: The user wants to know how to filter tests by the "Integration" category using `dotnet test`. Let me look at their test file to understand what test framework and attributes they're using.

data.content:
This is an MSTest project using `[TestCategory("Integration")]`. Run only Integration tests with:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```
